ticket: tell me about your shipping policy

classification.reason: Customer is inquiring about general shipping information

email.subject: Shipping Policy
email.body: Dear Customer, our shipping policy states that orders are processed within 24 hours. Standard shipping takes 3 to 5 business days, while express shipping takes 1 to 2 business days. A tracking number will be emailed after your order ships. If you have any further questions, please don't hesitate to ask.
